title: Yasna 53: The Wedding Hymn of Zoroaster's Daughter
description: The only personal detail from Zoroaster's life: instructions for his daughter's wedding.
introduction: The only personal detail from Zoroaster's life: instructions for his daughter's wedding.

translation.text: To you, Pouruchista, youngest daughter, I give this man in marriage with the blessing of Ahura Mazda.
